_comment: Daoist Peaks (道峰) — towering cold mountains wreathed in dao mist, where cultivators come to comprehend Dao. Treacherous cliffs. Perpetually shrouded in mist that dampens perception (canon: cultivators sit in meditation for years on these peaks). Stand-in spawns: skeleton=meditating ascetics (in deathly stillness), goat=mountain fauna, wolf=wild packs. Mineshaft structures stand in for ascetic caves carved into the peaks. Emerald ore (rare, mountain-only) reflects the precious insights gained here. Prime Directive: the peaks exist objectively; the dao mist is real meteorology, not a perception filter. The Dao is comprehended, not generated by the cultivator's mind.
